user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Hotel Express Breakfast (Lobby / Grab-and-Go)
fields.description: Quick hotel breakfast with grab-and-go options and a small seating area — continental items, coffee, yogurt, fruit, and breakfast sandwiches for a fast, efficient start before meetings.

insertion_point.reasoning: User's first meeting is at 9:00 AM; inserting this quick hotel breakfast at position 0 places it before the 9AM Client Kickoff Meeting and allows time to walk to the meeting after eating.
